Introducing Base44 Super Agents

Get your personal AI agent without the technical setup and under 3 min

Describe what you need. Your agent will handle the rest.

Get Your Super Agent

9:41
Superagent
Done. I connected your Stripe to HubSpot. When a payment fails, I'll create a follow-up task and send you a WhatsApp heads-up with the customer name and amount.
You
O
Nice. Can you also tag any failed payment over $500 as "High Priority" in HubSpot?
Superagent
Set. Anything over $500 gets tagged "High Priority" with the deal value and last 3 transactions attached. You'll see it in your morning summary.
Type a message

Plugs into everything you already use.
Just ask it to.

Your Superagent connects to Google Calendar, Gmail, Google Drive, Discord, Socials, Slack, your CRM, and more. It pulls data, triggers workflows, and acts across all your tools. All configured through conversation.

Gmail
Calendar
Drive
HubSpot
LinkedIn
Discord
Telegram
And many more via APIs or MCPs.

You shouldn't need a 37 min tutorial to use an AI agent.

Openclaw Base44 Agents
Setup Docker + Git + Node.js + API keys + Brave Search key + Telegram bot + SOUL.md + AGENTS.md + TOOLS.md A simple conversation
Time to first agent 10-15 min basic. Hours for full setup. 47-min YouTube tutorial exists for a reason. 2 minutes
Runs on Dedicated always-on machine. Mac Mini, old laptop, or VPS you maintain. Base44. Nothing to host.
Integrations Wire them yourself. Each one needs an API key and config. All your tools in one click. Gmail, Slack, Calendar, 300+ services.
Security Default config exposes your instance to the internet. You run security audit and hope. Managed by us. You don't think about it.
When it breaks Docker errors, gateway won't start, plugin install fails, memory broken by default. You debug. It recovers. You sleep.
Who it's for Technical people Anyone who can describe what they need

Everyone deserves an agent. We made it possible.

What happens after you build your agent

Day 1

First conversation

You set up your first agent by talking to it. It connects to Gmail and Slack. You watch it summarize your morning.

Week 1

New morning

You stop opening Gmail before 10am. Your agent sends you a briefing at 7. You start your day with real work.

Month 1

Full autopilot

You add lead gen, calendar management, reporting. One agent handles what used to take you 2 hours a day.

Month 3

New normal

You forget what it was like to triage email manually. Colleagues ask how you're getting so much done.

Ready to set up your agent?

Describe what you need and your agent takes it from there. Get started in minutes.

Get Your Super Agent

No credit card required. Free to get started.

FAQ

How is this different from Openclaw?

No Docker. No terminal. No API keys. You set it up in 2 minutes inside your Base44 workspace. It connects to services with one click, not code.

Do I need to know how to code?

No. You set up your agent by talking to it. Describe what you want and it figures out the rest.

What can it connect to?

Gmail, Slack, Google Calendar, Notion, HubSpot, Stripe, Telegram, and 300+ more. WhatsApp is coming soon.

Does it run when I'm not there?

Yes. Set a schedule and it runs automatically. Morning briefing at 7am, lead scraping at midnight, whatever you need.

Is my data secure?

Yes. Your agent runs in a sandboxed environment. Your credentials are encrypted and never shared. We don't store the content your agent reads or sends.

What does it cost?

Free to start. You only pay when your agent runs more than the free tier covers.
